entity.label: Gedor
entity.subtitle: Place
entity.description: 1 Chr. 4:39, the Gederah of Josh. 15:36, or the well-known Gerar, as the LXX. read, where the patriarchs of old had sojourned and fed their flocks (Gen. 20:1, 14, 15; 26:1, 6, 14).

nodes.label: Gedor
nodes.description: 1 Chr. 4:39, the Gederah of Josh. 15:36, or the well-known Gerar, as the LXX. read, where the patriarchs of old had sojourned and fed their flocks (Gen. 20:1, 14, 15; 26:1, 6, 14).

verses.text: And they went to the entrance of Gedor, even unto the east side of the valley, to seek pasture for their flocks.
